# crates/attractor-web

Leptos 0.7 full-stack web frontend providing an interactive browser-based CLI interface for the PAS (Pascal's Discrete Attractor) system. Supports dual-mode builds: `hydrate` for WASM client-side rendering and `ssr` for Axum-based server-side rendering with SQLite persistence, file watching, and PTY terminal sessions.

## Contents

[Cargo.toml](./Cargo.toml) — Package manifest defining `attractor-web` with Leptos 0.7 stack. `hydrate` feature enables WASM client (wasm-bindgen, gloo-net, web-sys, js-sys). `ssr` feature enables Axum server (leptos_axum, tokio, notify, portable-pty, sqlx). Internal deps: `attractor-pipeline`, `attractor-dot`, `attractor-types`.

[Leptos.toml](./Leptos.toml) — Leptos site config: output-name `attractor-web`, site-root `target/site`, site-pkg-dir `pkg`, style-file `style/main.scss`, site-addr `127.0.0.1:7777`, reload-port `7778`.

[package.json](./package.json) — xterm.js terminal dependencies: `@xterm/xterm@^5.5`, `@xterm/addon-fit@^0.10`, `@xterm/addon-web-links@^0.11`. Private package for web-based CLI terminal rendering.

[public/js/xterm-setup.js](./public/js/xterm-setup.js) — Client-side xterm.js initialization and PTY integration.

## Stack

- **Frontend**: Leptos 0.7 reactive components, WASM hydration
- **Backend**: Axum HTTP server, sqlx/SQLite, notify file watchers, portable-pty
- **Terminal**: xterm.js with fit and web-links addons
- **Build**: `ssr` feature (Axum binary), `hydrate` feature (WASM cdylib)
- **Output**: `target/site` with `pkg/` WASM package directory

## Subdirectories

[src/](./src/) — Root source files (`main.rs`, `lib.rs`, `app.rs`) plus `components/` and `server/` subdirectories.

[src/components/](./src/components/) — Leptos UI component library. Exports: `approval_bar`, `document_viewer`, `execution_node`, `execution_panel`, `folder_picker`, `layout`, `markdown_render`, `project_sidebar`, `terminal`. Core layout uses `ProjectSidebar` + `ProjectView` + `ExecutionPanel` triad. See [components/AGENTS.md](./src/components/AGENTS.md).

[src/server/](./src/server/) — Server-side SSR modules. Exports: `db` (SQLite), `documents`, `execute`, `projects`, `stream` (SSE), `terminal` (WebSocket). Provides Leptos `#[server]` functions for client-server communication. See [server/AGENTS.md](./src/server/AGENTS.md).

[style/](./style/) — SCSS stylesheet. Dark Catppuccin Mocha palette (`$primary: #89b4fa`, `$base: #1e1e2e`). Responsive 3-column layout at 1800px breakpoint.

## Architecture / Data Flow

```
Browser (WASM)              Axum Server (SSR)
┌─────────────────┐         ┌──────────────────────────────┐
│ Hydrated App    │         │ /api/terminal/ws  → PTY shell │
│ └─ProjectSidebar│◄───────►│ list_open_projects()         │
│ └─ProjectView   │  SSE    │ /api/documents/stream        │
│ └─ExecutionPanel│◄────────│ document_stream()             │
│ └─Terminal      │◄─WS─────│ ws_terminal()                 │
│   (xterm.js)    │         │                              │
│                 │         │ SQLite (projects, sessions)  │
│                 │         │ notify (file watching)        │
└─────────────────┘         └──────────────────────────────┘
```

## Patterns

- **Feature-gated builds**: `ssr` disables `main()`, `hydrate` enables WASM `hydrate_body()`
- **Reactive workspace state**: `RwSignal<Vec<Project>>` and `RwSignal<Option<i64>>` at root `App`, propagated via Leptos context
- **Display toggling**: `is_active()` gates CSS `display` per project view
- **Server functions**: Leptos `#[server]` attribute for RPC-style calls (`list_open_projects`, `load_project`, etc.)
- **PTY sessions**: WebSocket bridge between browser xterm.js and server-side portable-pty

## Integration

- `lib.rs` re-exports `App` from `crate::app` and `server` module; `hydrate()` sets panic hook then mounts
- `main.rs` initializes `AppState { db, watchers, terminal_sessions }`, binds WebSocket and SSE routes, calls `db::init_db()`
- `app.rs` imports `ProjectView` (`crate::components::layout`), `ProjectSidebar` (`crate::components::project_sidebar`), `list_open_projects` / `Project` (`crate::server::projects`)
- Workspace path: `attractor-web` crate accessible as `crate::components::*` and `crate::server::*` from sibling modules

## Behavioral Contracts

### Terminal WebSocket Protocol

Terminal I/O uses bidirectional WebSocket frames: client sends JSON `{ "type": "input", "data": "<bytes>" }` or `{ "type": "resize", "cols": N, "rows": N }`; server streams `{ "type": "output", "data": "<base64>" }` or `{ "type": "exit", "code": N }`.

### File Watching

notify file watchers in `server/execute.rs` monitor workspace files for changes, triggering live reload via SSE stream (`/api/documents/stream`).
